headline: HPE stockholders approved a 22 million share increase to the 2021 Stock Incentive Plan and re-elected all 12 board directors at the 2026 Annual Meeting.
investor_impact: The addition of 22 million shares to the equity plan introduces modest dilution but is standard for ongoing employee retention and compensation. Broad shareholder support across board nominees and say-on-pay reflects stable governance and no immediate activist concerns.
key_figures: 22,000,000 shares added to the 2021 Stock Incentive Plan
990,064,677 votes against the stockholder proposal on charitable support discrimination
